name: macOS Say TTS
description: Expose OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/speech and /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoints through OpenClaw.

defaultVoice.label: Default Voice
defaultVoice.help: macOS say voice name, for example Tingting.

defaultRate.label: Default Rate
defaultRate.help: Speech rate in words per minute when the request omits speed.

sampleRate.label: WAV Sample Rate
sampleRate.help: Output sample rate passed to afconvert when response_format is wav.

maxInputChars.label: Max Input Chars
maxInputChars.help: Reject requests whose input text exceeds this length.

maxAudioBytes.label: Max Audio Bytes
maxAudioBytes.help: Reject transcription uploads whose multipart body exceeds this size.

transcriptionBackend.label: Transcription Backend
transcriptionBackend.help: Use local whisper by default, or switch to OpenClaw runtime media-understanding.

transcriptionCommand.label: Transcription Command
transcriptionCommand.help: CLI command used for local transcription, for example whisper.

transcriptionModel.label: Transcription Model
transcriptionModel.help: Model name passed to the local whisper CLI.

transcriptionTimeoutSeconds.label: Transcription Timeout
transcriptionTimeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for local transcription runs.

commandMediaBaseUrl.label: Command Media Base URL
commandMediaBaseUrl.help: Base URL used to build temporary media links for /tts command replies.

mediaTtlSeconds.label: Media TTL Seconds
mediaTtlSeconds.help: How long temporary command-generated audio files remain downloadable.
